name: Ambedkar: Sonic Imagination Of Casteless Utopia. Book launch with Yogesh Maitreya and Sachin Sreenath
description: Join us for the launch of  Yogesh Maitreya's  book  Ambedkar: Sonic Imagination Of Casteless Utopia ,  in conversation with  Sachin Sreenath . Here are the event details: Date:  25th April, Saturday Time:  6:00 pm Venue:  Champaca, Vasanth Nagar. Click here  to RSVP for the event. About the Book: Ambedkar: Sonic Imagination of Casteless Utopia  by  Yogesh Maitreya  is a powerful, genre-blurring work that reimagines  B. R. Ambedkar  through sound, memory, and radical thought. It traces his journey by looking at the work, time and life of fifteen selected musicians across seven decades, and provides fresh perspectives to not only look at anti-caste movement in Maharashtra, but it also offers fresh perspectives to understand the music of anti-caste movement that shaped Dr Ambedkar into sonic imagination of casteless utopia over the last seven decades. About the Author: Yogesh Maitreya  is a poet, writer and publisher. The author of nine books, he travels across people’s realities and utopias they possess and strive for. In the form of meeting people in Europe and India who are keen to understand Dr Ambedkar, he feels that despite their number being so small, there still exist people in the world who are constantly working in their own ways to make the world a just and beautiful place.  About the Moderator: Sachin Sreenath  is an actor, movement artist and theatre practitioner trained at the Adishakti Theatre Research labs. He's been a theatre practitioner for past 11 years predominantly in Kannada and English spaces. He is also learning Yakshagana, Parai and Carnatic vocals. He is currently pursuing his Masters in Kannada Literature. Limited spots available,  RSVP  at the earliest!
